title: Error during static build
body:
I am currently facing the following error when trying the static build.

builder for '/nix/store/4az8b5h97kf2pqasmz8xp535dsld480p-go-1.14.6.drv' failed with exit code 1; last 10 log lines:
  ok        cmd/link        11.457s
  ok    cmd/link/internal/ld    7.362s
  ok     cmd/link/internal/sym   0.002s
  ok     cmd/nm  5.029s
  ok     cmd/objdump     3.410s
  ok     cmd/pack        1.390s
  ok     cmd/trace       0.049s
  ok     cmd/vet 24.041s
  FAIL
  go tool dist: Failed: exit status 1

I took exactly the steps from the installation page:

curl -L https://nixos.org/nix/install | sh
git clone https://github.com/containers/podman.git && cd podman
nix build -f nix/

Maybe somebody has an idea about that?

comments.body:
@mario19911 are you install and running nix with root? It supposed to be running with normal user, I had tried for many times with root and getting into trouble...

P.S. latest master branch build successfully on my local machine.


Hello,

now it is also working perfectly fine for me :) thank you!
